The Electronic Circuits Laboratory is furnished in order to apply the electrical and electronic circuit knowledge that students learn theoretically and to perform circuit simulations in a computer environment. In the Circuit Laboratory, circuits and simulations are realized with the electronic simulation program SPICE software and MATLABTM software, and analog and digital circuit experiments can be performed practically.

In the Circuit Laboratory: 10 Intel iI5 all-in-one computers, 10 4-channel 70 MHz digital oscilloscopes, 10 20 MHz signal generators, 10 bread board electronic experiment kits that can perform analog and digital electronic circuit experiments.

In addition, there are various resistors, capacitors, logic gates and similar test components to be used in experiments.
